subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from Us unto him who hath hearkened and turned, and attained unto the sealed wine. How many a servant hath been debarred from the ocean [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن سمع و اقبل و فاز بالرحیق المختوم کم من عبد منع عن البحر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment
